nodes.name: Send Email (Gmail)
nodes.notes: Attach your Gmail credential here. If greenli.biz is NOT on Google Workspace, replace this node with the 'Send Email' (SMTP) node and keep the same field mappings: To = {{ $json.to }}, Subject = {{ $json.subject }}, Text = {{ $json.text }}.

parameters.content:
## greenLi website forms → email

The website (greenli-website.vercel.app) POSTs every contact, extraction-simulation, and newsletter submission here as JSON with a `formType` field.

**To finish setup:**
1. Open **Send Email (Gmail)** and attach your email credential (Gmail OAuth, or swap to the SMTP 'Send Email' node).
2. **Save** and toggle the workflow **Active**.
3. Confirm the production webhook URL is `https://elib.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/greenli-forms` (matches the site's forms.js). If you change the path, update `GREENLI_WEBHOOK` in the site's forms.js.

Change the recipient anytime by editing `to: 'eitan@greenli.biz'` in the **Format submission** node — no site change needed.
